name: OSR Health, Inc.
business: The company is a global healthcare holding company that identifies, leads, and supports subsidiaries developing innovative pharmaceutical and medical device technologies, including oral T-cell immunotherapies, design-augmented biologics for bone and cartilage regeneration, and neurovascular surgical devices. It generates revenue primarily through its subsidiary RMC, which distributes medical devices. The company aims to realize liquidity through the sale of its subsidiaries to large healthcare companies.

exposures.sentence: Vaximm is developing innovative oral T-cell immunotherapies for the treatment of disorders that require the safe and targeted elimination of specific cell populations.
Darnatein is developing design-augmented (DA) biologics for age-related and other degenerative diseases, such as osteoarthritis and spine and joint disorders.
OSR Holdings net sales, cost of sales, and gross profit are primarily derived from RMC, its subsidiary engaged in the distribution of medical devices.

On January 26, 2026, OSR Holdings Co., Ltd. (OSRK), a subsidiary of the Company, completed the acquisition of Woori IO Co., Ltd., a South Korea-based medical device company developing non-invasive biosensing technology for glucose monitoring and related health parameters.

catalysts.event: Initiation of VXM01 phase 2/3 clinical trials
catalysts.sentence: Initiation of such trials is planned for 2026.

catalysts.event: Binding term sheet for VXM01 global license with BCME
catalysts.sentence: On January 13, 2026, Vaximm and BCME entered into a binding term sheet (the Binding Term Sheet), which supersedes and replaces the previously executed non-binding term sheet in its entirety.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Woori IO Co., Ltd.
catalysts.sentence: On January 26, 2026, OSR Holdings Co., Ltd. (OSRK), a subsidiary of the Company, completed the acquisition of Woori IO Co., Ltd.
OSR Holdings expects to continue utilizing the ELOC until the end of the Commitment Period (December 31, 2026) as set forth by the ELOC Agreement with White Lion.

catalysts.event: Nasdaq minimum bid price compliance deadline
catalysts.sentence: Nasdaq subsequently granted the Company an additional 180-day compliance period, extending the deadline to August 31, 2026, to regain compliance.
the maturity date was extended to October 15, 2026.
